info.name: AAAA Record - IPv6 Detection
author: rxerium
info.description: An AAAA record was detected. AAAA records are used to map domain names to IPv6 addresses.

request:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 30763
;; flags: rd; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 0, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 4096

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;firesplash.netlify.app.	IN	 AAAA
response:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 30763
;; flags: qr rd ra; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 2, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 1232

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;firesplash.netlify.app.	IN	 AAAA

;; ANSWER SECTION:
firesplash.netlify.app.	311	IN	AAAA	2600:1f18:16e:df01::259
firesplash.netlify.app.	311	IN	AAAA	2600:1f18:16e:df01::258

info.name: CAA Record
author: pdteam
info.description: A CAA record was discovered. A CAA record is used to specify which certificate authorities (CAs) are allowed to issue certificates for a domain.

request:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 30478
;; flags: rd; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 0, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 4096

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;firesplash.netlify.app.	IN	 CAA
response:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 30478
;; flags: qr rd ra; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 0, AUTHORITY: 1, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 1232

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;firesplash.netlify.app.	IN	 CAA

;; AUTHORITY SECTION:
netlify.app.	300	IN	SOA	dns1.p01.nsone.net. hostmaster.nsone.net. 1664979656 43200 7200 1209600 300

info.name: Wildcard DNS Configuration - Detection
author: rxerium
info.description: A wildcard DNS configuration was detected. Wildcard DNS records can resolve all subdomains to the same IP address, which may indicate a catch-all configuration.

request:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 15875
;; flags: rd; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 0, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 4096

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;3DCEYzij0ctR5Zdx3VBsrJTpxMp-3DCEYzij0ctR5Zdx3VBsrJTpxMp.firesplash.netlify.app.	IN	 A
response:
;; opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 15875
;; flags: qr rd ra; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 2, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version 0; flags:; udp: 512

;; QUESTION SECTION:
;3DCEYzij0ctR5Zdx3VBsrJTpxMp-3DCEYzij0ctR5Zdx3VBsrJTpxMp.firesplash.netlify.app.	IN	 A

;; ANSWER SECTION:
3DCEYzij0ctR5Zdx3VBsrJTpxMp-3DCEYzij0ctR5Zdx3VBsrJTpxMp.firesplash.netlify.app.	120	IN	A	18.208.88.157
3DCEYzij0ctR5Zdx3VBsrJTpxMp-3DCEYzij0ctR5Zdx3VBsrJTpxMp.firesplash.netlify.app.	120	IN	A	98.84.224.111

info.name: Missing Subresource Integrity
author: lucky0x0d
pulsesecurity.co.nz
sullo amarsct
info.description: Checks if external script and stylesheet tags in the HTML response are missing the Subresource Integrity (SRI) attribute.

request:
GET / HTTP/1.1
Host: firesplash.netlify.app
User-Agent: Nuclei - Open-source project (github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei)
Connection: close
Accept: */*
Accept-Language: en
Accept-Encoding: gzip
response: HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: close Accept-Ranges: bytes Age: 193 Cache-Control: public,max-age=0,must-revalidate Cache-Status: "Netlify Edge"; hit Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8 Date: Sun, 03 May 2026 03:09:19 GMT Etag: "70b7a413445c55800ba31fe109f9cc0a-ssl-df" Server: Netlify Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload Vary: Accept-Encoding X-Nf-Request-Id: 01KQNWZNM6E1QV5NQQZW6M911A FireSplash - Estimation moyens aériens

info.name: Detect SSL Certificate Issuer
author: lingtren
info.description: Extract the issuer's organization from the target's certificate. Issuers are entities which sign and distribute certificates.

info.name: SSL DNS Names
author: pdteam
info.description: Extract the Subject Alternative Name (SAN) from the target's certificate. SAN facilitates the usage of additional hostnames with the same certificate.

info.name: Wildcard TLS Certificate
author: lucky0x0d
info.description: Checks a sites certificate to see if there are wildcard CN or SAN entries.

info.name: TLS Version - Detect
author: pdteam
pussycat0x
info.description:
TLS version detection is a security process used to determine the version of the Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol used by a computer or server.
It is important to detect the TLS version in order to ensure secure communication between two computers or servers.
